div.p: Multiple neurons process the same input vector independently
Per neuron: nin weights + 1 bias = nin + 1 Layer total: nout × (nin + 1) Example (nin=3, nout=4):

ul.li: All neurons receive the same input vector x
Each neuron computes independently (no connections between neurons)
Outputs form a vector y ∈ ℝⁿᵒᵘᵗ

div.p: W ∈ ℝⁿᵒᵘᵗ×ⁿⁱⁿ Each row = one neuron's weights
